creator: kenrap@kennethraplee.com
text:
% uname -aKU
FreeBSD freebsd 15.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT #0 main-n273419-523913c94371: Sun Nov  3 03:45:54 PST 2024     root@freebsd:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC-NODEBUG amd64 1500026 1500026
